summary.source_policy: static source classification plus focused cargo tests; no credential values read

remediated_findings.finding: CiRequest::CiGetRefStatus existed but CiRequest::to_operation omitted it, while ClientRpcRequest already mapped the equivalent request to _ci:ref-status:<repo>:<ref> read authority.
remediated_findings.fix: Added CiRequest::CiGetRefStatus -> Operation::Read and regression test ci_ref_status_requires_read_authorization.

remediated_findings.finding: ClientRpcRequest classification drift test stopped at MAX_CLIENT_REQUEST_VARIANTS=256 while the enum has 350 variants.
